question_intent: Average goals allowed per game by goalies in the Campbell Conference

plan.question_intent: Average goals allowed per game by goalies in the Campbell Conference
plan.detail_query:
SELECT leaf_1.playerid, leaf_1.year, leaf_1.ga, leaf_1.gp, leaf_1.ga_per_game
FROM (
  SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, CAST(g.ga AS REAL) / CAST(g.gp AS REAL) AS ga_per_game
  FROM goalies g
  JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
  JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
  WHERE a.type = 'Conference' AND a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference'
) AS leaf_1

build_logs.notes: Average goals allowed per game by goalies in the Campbell Conference

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, CAST(g.ga AS REAL) / CAST(g.gp AS REAL) AS ga_per_game
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference')) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.ga_per_game) AS avg_ga_per_game
FROM (SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, CAST(g.ga AS REAL) / CAST(g.gp AS REAL) AS ga_per_game
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference')) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.ga) AS avg_goals_allowed
FROM (SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.ga
FROM goalies g
JOIN combinedshutouts cs ON g.playerid = cs.idgoalie1 OR g.playerid = cs.idgoalie2
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference')
GROUP BY g.playerid, g.year, g.ga) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average of the goals-against per game values for all goalies who played in the Campbell Conference?
